headline: Zazzle Names Brian Yick Chief Strategy Officer
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., June 23, 2026--Zazzle, the platform where ideas become real things that create lasting moments, today announced that Brian Yick has joined the company as Chief Strategy Officer. In the role, Yick will lead business and corporate development and help drive the company's growth as a technology platform.

headline: Partly Closes Historic Series B Raise at $500M Valuation and Announces Immediate US Market Expansion
summary: Partly, creators of the Interpreter AI model for the automotive repair supply chain, today announced its DST Global Partners-led $50M Series B raise, as well as the brand's US market launch – positioning Partly as the leading AI infrastructure company for the automotive repair sector.
